name: my-watch-later
description: A YouTube Watch Later feature that you own
author: Michael Moreno

scripts.format: prettier --write src/**/*.js && prettier --write builder.js && prettier --write my-watch-later.js
scripts.lint: eslint src/**/*.js && eslint builder.js && eslint my-watch-later.js
scripts.lint-fix: eslint --fix src/**/*.js && eslint --fix builder.js && eslint --fix my-watch-later.js
